title: Add pack-interface validation, import-boundary guards, and second-pack proofs
summary: Proves the new architecture with validator coverage, boundary guards, and a synthetic second-pack fixture.
scope_items: Add pack-interface validation coverage and import-boundary guards.
Add a second-pack fixture and portability proofs that do not require core code edits for pack adoption.
done_when_items: validate all enforces the pack interface and dependency direction.
A second pack can be registered and exercised through the same host seam.
